application_overview.description: A generic web application with navigation, forms, and data display.
expected_behaviors: Navigation links change the URL and render the correct page content
Forms validate required fields before submission
Invalid input shows a clear, specific error message
Successful form submission updates the UI with a confirmation or result
Boundary values (min, max, empty) are handled gracefully
XSS payloads are never reflected raw in the page body

sample_test_cases.title: Navigate to a page via a navigation link and verify it loads
sample_test_cases.precondition: User is on the source page
steps: Locate the navigation link using the provided locator
Verify the browser URL matches the destination page URL
sample_test_cases.expected_result: Browser URL changes to the destination page URL and the correct page content is rendered

sample_test_cases.title: Submit a form with valid inputs and verify success
sample_test_cases.precondition: User is on the form page with all required fields visible
steps: Fill in each required field with a valid value
Verify a success message, result section, or page change is shown
sample_test_cases.expected_result: A success message or result section is visible confirming the submission was processed

sample_test_cases.title: Submit a form with a required field left empty
sample_test_cases.precondition: User is on the form page
steps: Verify a validation error message appears and the form is not submitted
sample_test_cases.expected_result: A validation error message appears and the user remains on the form page

sample_test_cases.title: Submit a form with a logically invalid value and verify an error is shown
sample_test_cases.precondition: User is on the form page
steps: Enter a logically invalid value into the relevant field
Verify the appropriate validation error is displayed
sample_test_cases.expected_result: A specific validation error message is displayed and the form is not submitted

sample_test_cases.title: Submit a form with the minimum allowed input value
sample_test_cases.precondition: User is on the form page
steps: Enter the minimum valid value into the relevant field
Verify the UI handles the minimum value correctly without error
sample_test_cases.expected_result: Form accepts the minimum value and shows the correct result or confirmation without an error

sample_test_cases.title: Submit an XSS payload in a text field and verify it is not reflected
sample_test_cases.precondition: User is on the form page
steps: Enter an XSS payload into a text input field
Verify the raw script tag is not rendered in the page body
sample_test_cases.expected_result: The raw <script> tag is NOT visible in the page body; the XSS payload is escaped or rejected
